title: biVI supporting data
author: Maria Carilli
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Simulated and experimental single cell RNA sequencing datasets analyzed to benchmark biVI and illustrate biVI 's ability to infer biophysical parameters are included in data.zip. All data files are described in README_data.md. Parameter inference results and figures are found in results.zip. All results included in results.zip are described in README_results.md. The associated project GitHub can be found at https://github.com/pachterlab/CGCCP_2023.
